name: @sdp/lcp-javascript-sdk
description: LCP Local Cache JavaScript SDK aligned to LCP v1.0.0.
author: SDP Team

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:esm && npm run build:cjs && npm run build:types && npm run build:browser && npm run build:browser:versioned && npm run build:browser:alias && npm run build:min && npm run build:min:versioned
scripts.build:browser:versioned: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const pkg=require('./package.json'); fs.copyFileSync('dist/lcp-javascript-sdk.min.js', 'dist/lcp-javascript-sdk-' + pkg.version + '.min.js'); fs.copyFileSync('dist/lcp-javascript-sdk.min.js.map', 'dist/lcp-javascript-sdk-' + pkg.version + '.min.js.map');"
scripts.build:min:versioned: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const pkg=require('./package.json'); fs.copyFileSync('min/lcp-local-cache.min.js', 'min/lcp-local-cache-' + pkg.version + '.min.js'); fs.copyFileSync('min/lcp-local-cache.min.js.map', 'min/lcp-local-cache-' + pkg.version + '.min.js.map');"
scripts.test:browser: npm run build && playwright test -c playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:parity:cross-sdk: npm run build && playwright test -c playwright.config.ts tests/browser/cross.sdk.parity.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.test:release: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run smoke && npm pack --dry-run
